text:
Once there lived a young man named Alex who was fascinated by the stars. He spent his nights in the quiet neighborhood park, gazing upward through the velvety blackness, searching for constellations that his teachers had mentioned in class. Alex dreamed of traveling the world, like those adventurous people he'd read about in his grandparents' old adventure books.

One rainy evening, after a long day delivering pizzas and watching far too many of his buddies binge-watch movies, Alex decided he must do something more than just fantasize about travel. He decided to become an astronomer.

After high school, Alex enrolled in college, majoring in astronomy. Day and night, he studied star formation, Martian geology, and the evolution of the universe. His nights were filled with telescopes, his weekends with symposia, and dreams of publishing his findings.

However, Alex's career took an unexpected turn. A sudden shift in the weather affected his city's telescopes, and his dream telescope,
